title: Homepage section redesign and Play page file upload
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Drag, drop, and redesign
gist.blurb: We've spruced up the homepage with fresh brutalist cards and colorful pill containers. Even better? You can finally drag and drop files directly into the Play page—no more hunting for image URLs!
gist.summary: Introduces a refreshed homepage layout with new section designs, alongside drag-and-drop file upload capabilities for the Play page.
gist.impact: Visitors get a cleaner, more intuitive landing page, and creators can now upload local images up to 5MB directly instead of pasting URLs.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a painter's beret, painting a brutalist-style card or organizing colorful pill-shaped containers. The robot companion is happily dropping a pixelated image file into a glowing box.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, painting a chunky brutalist-style card. Nearby, a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head happily drops a pixelated image file into a glowing lime green (#ecf874) box. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
